title: Frama-C Verification Platform
summary: A simplified C program static analysis platform inspired by Frama-C. Implements a C parser with CFG construction, an abstract interpretation-based value analysis (Eva) for detecting runtime errors, and an SV-COMP verification adapter.
instructionPreview: Implement a simplified C program static analysis platform inspired by Frama-C. Working directory: /workspace. Three modules to implement in order: 1. frama_c: C parser (pycparser), CFG builder, analysis framework with fake libc headers 2. eva: Abstract interpretation with interval domain, fixpoint computation, alarm detection 3. frama_c_sv: SV-COMP verification adapter with property parsing and reachability analysis Each module has tests in /tests/<module>/test_outputs.py run via pytest.
instruction:
Implement a simplified C program static analysis platform inspired by Frama-C.
Working directory: /workspace. Three modules to implement in order:
1. frama_c: C parser (pycparser), CFG builder, analysis framework with fake libc headers
2. eva: Abstract interpretation with interval domain, fixpoint computation, alarm detection
3. frama_c_sv: SV-COMP verification adapter with property parsing and reachability analysis
Each module has tests in /tests/<module>/test_outputs.py run via pytest.

moduleDag.description: A simplified C program static analysis platform inspired by Frama-C. Implements a C parser with CFG construction, an abstract interpretation-based value analysis (Eva) for detecting runtime errors, and an SV-COMP verification adapter.

nodes.label: Frama-C Analysis Framework
nodes.description: Core analysis framework with C parser (pycparser), CFG builder, plugin architecture, and fake libc headers for preprocessing.

nodes.label: Eva Value Analysis Plugin
nodes.description: Abstract interpretation engine with interval domain, fixpoint computation, and alarm detection for division-by-zero, null dereference, buffer overflow, integer overflow, and unsafe function usage.

nodes.label: Frama-C SV-COMP Adapter
nodes.description: SV-COMP verification adapter that parses property files, preprocesses SV-COMP benchmarks, and performs reachability analysis using interval arithmetic with assumption tracking.

edges.label: Eva uses parser and CFG from core framework
SV-COMP adapter uses Eva's interval domain for verification
